metadata.description: Deep Suite — structured development, wiki, autonomous experimentation, independent code review, document gardening, and harness diagnostics plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: deep-wiki
plugins.description: LLM-managed markdown wiki — v1.4.1 Track C synthesizer agent split for trust-boundary closure: replaces unified `wiki-synthesizer` with 3 split agents (`wiki-synthesizer-{analysis,worker,inline}`); active agents (analysis + worker) have `tools: [Read, Glob, Grep, WebFetch]` (Write physically removed → tool-level M1 closure). Qualified namespace routing (V-0 empirical: `deep-wiki:wiki-X` resolves, unqualified errors out — Step 7.6.A explicit comment forbids `general-purpose` fallback that caused v1.4.0 dogfood failure). New `scripts/lint-agent-tools.sh` (Bash 3.2 portable, frontmatter manifest enforcement). New `_post_dispatch_dirty_scan()` at 3 sites (WIKI_TEST_MODE=1 gated, production cost zero). Inline file DORMANT with `status:dormant` + `last_known_active:v1.3.0` + `contract_frozen_at:a9966c7` rot-mitigation header. Layered defense-in-depth (NOT comprehensive enforcement) — L1 (V-0 best-effort without runtime metadata API) + L2 (§3.9 in-root scope only, NOT off-root /tmp writes from v1.4.0 realized failure mode) honestly disclosed in CHANGELOG. Track C v2 deferred to post-runtime-API; process-level sandboxing deferred to v1.5.0+. A5 single-source page-fanout + A4 multi-source paths preserved structurally from v1.4.0 (NOT byte-identical: split-agent dispatch shape change). Migration: external callers using `subagent_type: "wiki-synthesizer"` MUST switch to qualified `deep-wiki:wiki-synthesizer-{inline|analysis|worker}` (no shim per Option B).

plugins.name: deep-evolve
plugins.description: Autonomous Experimentation Protocol — virtual parallel N-seed, adaptive scheduler, cross-seed borrow, cascade synthesis

plugins.name: deep-review
plugins.description: Independent Evaluator for AI coding agents — cross-model review + Phase 6 subagent delegation

plugins.name: deep-dashboard
plugins.description: Cross-plugin harness diagnostics — harnessability scoring and unified dashboard
